about.heading: Where Learning Meets Aloha
about.description: HonuHub is the physical heart of HonuVibe.AI — a premium learning space in Waikiki that functions as a classroom, conference room, and innovation lab. Whether you're joining in person or streaming from anywhere in the world, HonuHub brings the energy of Hawaii to every learning experience.
about.description_2: Equipped with professional AV equipment, high-speed internet, and a collaborative atmosphere, HonuHub is designed to make AI education tangible, social, and inspiring.

in_person.description: Hands-on workshops and seminars in our Waikiki space. Small groups, direct instructor access, and collaborative learning.

kwame.heading: KwameBrathwaite.com
kwame.sub: A photography archive gets a modern makeover
kwame.problem: The legacy site for legendary photographer Kwame Brathwaite needed a complete transformation — mobile-unfriendly, slow, and missing conversion opportunities for print sales, licensing, and exhibition bookings.
kwame.description: Using Claude, Cursor, and a modern AI-powered workflow, we're rebuilding KwameBrathwaite.com from the ground up. The new site preserves the archive's cultural significance while driving real business outcomes — sales, licensing inquiries, and brand partnerships.
kwame.outcome: A mobile-first, conversion-optimized photography archive that honors a legendary artist's legacy while growing the business.

hci.heading: HCI Medical Group
hci.sub: Healthcare platform with custom project management
hci.problem: HCI Medical Group needed a modern, professional web presence and an internal project management tool to streamline operations across their medical practice.
hci.description: We delivered a complete front-end redesign that elevated the brand's digital presence, plus a custom-built project management module in the backend for internal team coordination and workflow tracking.
hci.outcome: A polished, conversion-ready healthcare website paired with powerful internal tools that streamline daily operations.

hero.headline: From Idea to Launch
hero.sub: A proven process refined across dozens of projects. Whether it's a website, a SaaS tool, a database application, or an intelligent automation — we build it with you, not just for you.

territories.headline: Five Areas of Innovation
territories.sub: From web design to pro-bono work, we build across the full spectrum.
territories.web_desc: Visually impactful, mobile-first websites built for performance and conversion. From brand-new builds to complete redesigns that transform digital presence.
territories.db_desc: Custom applications that solve real business problems with smart data architecture. Inventory systems, client portals, scheduling tools — built to scale.
territories.saas_desc: Micro-SaaS products and internal tools that save time and reduce costs. Built lean, shipped fast, designed to grow.
territories.auto_desc: Intelligent workflows that eliminate repetitive tasks and unlock capacity. Zapier, N8N, AI-powered pipelines — connecting your tools into a seamless system.
territories.pro_desc: Giving back is core to the Aloha Standard. Featured projects for organizations making a difference — same quality, same commitment, no invoice.

tech.headline: Built With Claude at the Core
tech.sub: Modern tools and frameworks for building fast, scalable, and intelligent applications.
tech.claude_tagline: AI pair programmer powering every build

claude_workflow.heading: AI-Native Development
claude_workflow.sub: Claude isn't just in our toolkit — it's woven into every stage of how we build.
claude_workflow.card1_desc: Claude Code turns ideas into working prototypes in hours, not weeks. First draft to functional demo in a single session.
claude_workflow.card2_desc: Every system design goes through Claude for architecture review, security analysis, and optimization before a single line ships.
claude_workflow.card3_desc: From code review to documentation to testing — Claude is our pair programmer throughout the entire development lifecycle.

process.headline: How We Work
process.sub: A proven process refined across dozens of projects. Clear milestones, transparent communication, and real results.
process.step_1_desc: We start by understanding your vision, your users, and your constraints. Every great build begins with great listening.
process.step_2_desc: Architecture, design system, and technical plan — documented clearly so you always know what's being built and why.
process.step_3_desc: Iterative development with regular check-ins. You see progress weekly, not just at the end. Built with modern tools for speed and quality.
process.step_4_desc: Deployment, testing, and handoff. We don't disappear after launch — we make sure everything works in the real world.
process.step_5_desc: Post-launch support, iteration, and optimization. The best products evolve. We're here for the long game.

engage.headline: Ways to Engage
engage.project_desc: You have an idea — a website, a tool, an app, an automation. We scope it, design it, build it, and launch it together. Fixed scope or ongoing.
engage.consulting_desc: Need clarity on AI strategy, tool selection, or workflow optimization? Short engagements focused on decisions that matter.
engage.probono_desc: Doing important work with limited resources? We take on a small number of pro-bono projects each year. Same quality, same commitment. Tell us about your mission.

form.headline: Tell Us About Your Project
form.sub: Whether it's a passion project, a business tool, or a nonprofit mission — we'd love to hear your vision. We respond to every inquiry within 5-7 business days.

build_page.advisory_link: Looking for strategic advisory, board participation, or a high-impact partnership?

hero.heading: A Whole New Vibe for AI
hero.sub: In Hawaiian culture, the honu (green sea turtle) is a symbol of wisdom, endurance, and safe passage through unknown waters. HonuVibe carries that spirit — guiding curious minds through the vast ocean of AI with patience, purpose, and aloha.

mission.heading: Mission & Vision
mission.description: The honu navigates thousands of miles across open ocean, always finding its way home. We believe that same quiet determination lives in every builder and entrepreneur reaching for something new. HonuVibe exists to be the current that carries them forward — bridging Hawaii and Japan to make cutting-edge AI accessible to everyone.
mission.mission_text: To make cutting-edge AI education approachable, actionable, and community-driven — for Hawaii's local business community, ambitious entrepreneurs across the US, and Japanese learners eager to access emerging AI technologies from the source. Like the honu, we move with intention: steady progress over hype, real skills over shortcuts.
mission.vision_text: A world where every entrepreneur, regardless of technical background or geography, has the tools and community they need to build with AI. The honu thrives because it belongs to both land and sea — and HonuVibe thrives at the intersection of cultures, from Waikiki to Tokyo, creating a new standard for practitioner-focused education.

aloha_standard.heading: The Aloha Standard
aloha_standard.sub: Aloha is not a marketing tagline — it is the actual operating standard for how HonuVibe shows up in every interaction.

give_generously.title: Give Generously
give_generously.description: Free content, free community access, transparent information. We trust that generosity compounds.

pro_bono.title: Pro-Bono Is Real Work
pro_bono.description: When a nonprofit or community organization comes to HonuVibe, they receive the same quality of attention as any paying client.

celebrate_community.title: Celebrate the Community
celebrate_community.description: Member wins — launched apps, grown businesses, shipped projects — are HonuVibe moments. We make space for those stories.

never_fear.title: Never Fear-Based
never_fear.description: We don't use urgency tactics or 'AI is coming for your job' framing. Ever. We lead with curiosity, not anxiety.

competencies.heading: Core Competencies
competencies.sub: From rapid prototyping to full curriculum development, HonuVibe brings practitioner expertise to every engagement.

prototyping.title: AI Prototyping
prototyping.description: Rapid AI prototype building and product development. From concept to working demo in days, not months.

micro_saas.title: Micro-SaaS Design
micro_saas.description: Design and deploy focused SaaS products that solve real problems. Purpose-built, lean, and revenue-ready.

integration.title: AI Integration
integration.description: Integrate AI into existing organizations and workflows. We meet businesses where they are and build from there.

education.title: AI Education
education.description: Training, curriculum development, and community-driven learning. Bilingual EN/JP education designed by practitioners.

competencies.cta_description: We take on a small number of passion projects and high-impact engagements each year. If you want to work together, we'd love to hear from you.

founder.heading: Ryan Jackson
founder.bio_p1: Ryan is the founder of HonuVibe.AI and brings a unique combination of business strategy, international market experience, and hands-on AI expertise. With deep roots in both the California entrepreneurial ecosystem and the Japanese business community, Ryan bridges the gap between American AI innovation and the needs of international professionals.
founder.bio_p2: Ryan works daily with the latest AI platforms — Claude, ChatGPT, and a wide range of professional AI tools — and brings that practitioner experience directly into the classroom. His teaching style is hands-on and jargon-free: every session is built around doing, not just watching.
founder.bio_p3: As a leader in the AI education space, Ryan is actively involved in the entrepreneurial, AI, and venture capital communities across Hawaii and California — bringing real-world insights on how AI is transforming American businesses into every lesson.
founder.education_1: MBA, International Business — USC Marshall School of Business
founder.education_2: BS, Business/Corporate Communications and Economics — Northwestern University

hero.heading: Better Together
hero.sub: A global community of entrepreneurs, builders, and curious minds — united by AI and aloha.

about.heading: More Than a Course — A Community
about.description: The HonuVibe community lives on Skool — a space where members share wins, ask questions, collaborate on projects, and support each other's AI journeys. Whether you're launching your first SaaS or exploring AI for the first time, you belong here.
about.description_2: Weekly live sessions, project showcases, and direct access to Ryan and fellow practitioners make this the most active bilingual AI community online.

privacy_page.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.intro: HonuVibe.AI ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you voluntarily provide when you register, make a purchase, subscribe to our newsletter, fill out a form, or contact us. This may include your name, email address, billing information, and any other information you choose to provide.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to provide and maintain our services, process transactions, send communications about courses and events, improve our website and user experience, and comply with legal obligations.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website and services (such as payment processors, email providers, and analytics services), subject to confidentiality agreements.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. You can control cookies through your browser settings. For more information, see our Cookie Notice.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@honuvibe.ai.

international.title: International Data Transfers
international.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for such transfers.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on our website with a new effective date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@honuvibe.ai.

terms_page.heading: Terms of Service
terms_page.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of HonuVibe.AI website and services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

use.title: Use of Services
use.content: You may use our services for lawful purposes only. You agree not to misuse our services, interfere with their operation, or attempt to access them using unauthorized methods.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

payments.title: Payments & Refunds
payments.content: Course and session purchases are processed through Stripe. Refund requests must be made within 14 days of purchase. Digital content that has been accessed is generally non-refundable.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content on HonuVibe.AI — including courses, videos, text, graphics, and software — is owned by HonuVibe or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our permission.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: Our services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee specific outcomes from using our courses or services.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, HonuVibe shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to our services at our discretion, with or without notice, for any violation of these terms.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Hawaii, USA, without regard to conflict of law principles.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@honuvibe.ai.

cookies_page.heading: Cookie Notice
cookies_page.intro: This Cookie Notice explains how HonuVibe.AI uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website.

what.title: What Are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.

types.title: Types of Cookies We Use
types.content: Essential Cookies: Required for the website to function properly (authentication, security, language preferences). Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors use our site (Plausible Analytics — privacy-focused, no personal data collected). Preference Cookies: Remember your settings such as theme preference (dark/light mode) and language selection.

third_party.title: Third-Party Cookies
third_party.content: We use minimal third-party services. Plausible Analytics does not use cookies and respects Do Not Track. Payment processing through Stripe may set cookies required for transaction security.

control.title: Managing Cookies
control.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies.

changes.title: Changes to This Notice
changes.content: We may update this Cookie Notice as our practices change. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: Questions about our cookie practices? Contact us at privacy@honuvibe.ai.

instructor_apply.meta_description: Share what you know. Earn on every enrollment. Join a curated roster of builders teaching AI on HonuVibe.
instructor_apply.hero_headline: Share what you know. Earn on what you ship.
instructor_apply.hero_sub: HonuVibe instructors are a small, curated roster of builders teaching real-world AI skills. Apply to propose a course — if it's a fit, we'll partner with you to bring it to students.
instructor_apply.why_heading: Built for instructors who actually build

revenue.title: Real revenue share
revenue.description: You earn on every enrollment in your course. Bilingual reach, transparent splits, monthly payouts.

quality.title: Curated, not crowded
quality.description: We invite a small roster of credible builders. You won't be buried under 10,000 low-quality courses.

support.title: We handle the platform
support.description: Hosting, payments, email, cohort ops, student support — all on us. You focus on the material.

community.title: Plug into communities
community.description: HonuVibe, Vertice Society, SmashHaus and more. Your course can reach audiences already organized around a vertical.

instructor_apply.form_sub: A few minutes now saves a back-and-forth later. Everything is confidential.

form.bio_short_placeholder: What you do, what you've built, why you're credible in your field.

form.success_body: We read every application ourselves. Expect to hear back within 5–7 business days. In the meantime, feel free to browse our current courses.

step3.title: 3. We scope your course together

step4.title: 4. You teach, we pay
step4.description: You run the course. We handle payments, students, and support. You earn on every enrollment.

instructors.ryan_bio: Founder of HonuVibe.AI. Uniquely combines business strategy, international market experience, and practical AI expertise. With deep roots in both the California entrepreneurial ecosystem and the Japanese business community, he acts as a bridge connecting American AI innovation with the needs of international professionals. Using Claude, ChatGPT, and a wide array of AI tools daily in his work, he actively participates in the AI, venture capital, and entrepreneurial communities across Hawaii and California. His teaching style is practical and easy to understand, with every session centered around 'learning by doing'.
instructors.ryan_education_1: MBA (International Business) — USC Marshall School of Business
instructors.mizuho_bio: Brings extensive corporate business experience and a native Japanese perspective. As Lead AI Trainer, she translates cutting-edge AI concepts into practical, culturally relevant applications, ensuring every lesson aligns with the real-world needs of Japanese professionals. Through her corporate operations background, she deeply understands the workflows and organizational dynamics Japanese professionals face daily. Working alongside Ryan, she helps deliver a truly bilingual learning experience.
instructors.chimi_bio: Uniquely combines healthcare expertise, business operations, and AI consulting. As a certified Occupational Therapist, she understands how people learn and integrate new tools into their work, making her uniquely effective as an AI Trainer. She applies her practical experience in implementing new systems and processes into organizations to AI education. Together with Ryan and Mizuho, she provides hands-on support to every student. Her careful, detailed approach is particularly popular among AI beginners.

hero.subhead: Practical AI training and community for the people doing the actual work — professionals, solopreneurs, small businesses, creators, and the organizations that support them.
hero.social_proof: Joined by <count>500+</count> learners across EN & JP
hero.lesson_1_desc: Architecture, training, and what sets Claude apart from other LLMs.
hero.lesson_2_desc: Structure, tone, and patterns for effective system-level instructions.
hero.lesson_3_desc: How Claude manages conversation context and what that means for your prompts.
hero.lesson_4_desc: Designing dialogue flows that stay coherent across multiple exchanges.

how_it_works.card_1_body: Live cohorts and self-paced courses, in English and Japanese, taught by working practitioners.
how_it_works.card_2_body: Real projects, real workflows, real outcomes. The Vault keeps everything you've learned in reach.
how_it_works.card_3_body: A bilingual community, expert mentors, and an Aloha-grounded standard for showing up.

value_props.card_1_body: Learn from working examples and real projects, not lecture-hall theory. Every lesson ties back to something you can apply on Monday morning.
value_props.card_2_body: Built for English and Japanese learners simultaneously — not as an afterthought. Full curriculum in both languages, always.
value_props.card_3_body: A growing self-study library of AI lessons, frameworks, and tools you can revisit anytime — not a static course you finish and forget.

vault_section.heading: A learning library that grows with you.
vault_section.body: Most AI courses leave you with a certificate and nothing else. The Vault is different — it's an always-on library of lessons, frameworks, prompt libraries, and real-world workflows that evolves alongside AI itself. Access it on your timeline, revisit it whenever you need a refresh.
vault_section.caption: The Vault — AI learning library for HonuVibe members

featured_courses.heading: Featured Courses
featured_courses.course_1_body: Foundational AI literacy for professionals. Understand how AI works, where it applies to your work, and how to start using it today.
featured_courses.course_2_body: Hands-on application and custom AI workflows. Build real systems, automate real tasks, and integrate AI into your actual day-to-day work.
featured_courses.course_3_body: For learners who want to go deeper. Claude Code, Micro-SaaS development, Workflow Automation, and shipping real AI products.

org_section.heading: Bring AI training to your team or community.
org_section.body: We partner with leading organizations to deliver bilingual AI training programs to their members, employees, and communities — fully tailored to your audience.

exploration.heading: Explore Our Work
exploration.subhead: Real projects. Real outcomes. Built by the HonuVibe community.
exploration.project_1_desc: A photography archive gets a modern overhaul.
exploration.project_2_desc: Local farmers market e-commerce with AI product descriptions.
exploration.project_3_desc: Internal scheduling tool built during the Builder Track cohort.

testimonials.heading: What People Are Saying
testimonials.quote_1_text: I've taken a lot of online courses. HonuVibe is the first one where I actually changed how I work within the first week.
testimonials.quote_2_text: The bilingual format made all the difference for our team. Half speaks English, half Japanese — and everyone got the same depth.
testimonials.quote_3_text: The Vault alone is worth it. I went back to the prompt engineering module three times as my projects evolved.

meta.title: Explore — Real projects, real outcomes | HonuVibe
meta.description: See what happens when AI education meets real-world application. Featured client work, community builds, and our pro-bono partnerships.

hero.subhead: See what happens when AI education meets real-world application. These are projects built by HonuVibe and the HonuVibe community.

featured_projects.kwame_desc: A photography archive gets a modern makeover.
featured_projects.kwame_challenge: The legacy site for legendary photographer Kwame Brathwaite needed a complete transformation — mobile-unfriendly, slow, and missing conversion opportunities for print sales, licensing, and exhibition bookings.
featured_projects.kwame_outcome: Rebuilding from the ground up with Claude, Cursor, and a modern AI-powered workflow. The new site preserves the archive's cultural significance while driving real business outcomes.
featured_projects.kwame_highlight: A mobile-first, conversion-optimized photography archive that honors a legendary artist's legacy while growing the business.
featured_projects.hci_desc: A healthcare website and internal project management tool.
featured_projects.hci_challenge: HCI Medical Group needed a modern, professional web presence and an internal project management tool to streamline operations across their medical practice.
featured_projects.hci_outcome: A complete front-end redesign that elevated the brand's digital presence, plus a custom-built project management module for internal team coordination and workflow tracking.
featured_projects.hci_highlight: A polished, conversion-ready healthcare website paired with powerful internal tools that streamline daily operations.
featured_projects.placeholder_body: We partner with nonprofits, community organizations, and passionate builders to bring AI-powered projects to life. Some of our best work starts with a conversation.

how_we_build.headline: How we build.
how_we_build.subhead: Every project follows the same disciplined process — whether it's a client engagement, a community build, or a pro-bono partnership.
how_we_build.discovery_body: We start by understanding your goals, your audience, and what success looks like. No assumptions.
how_we_build.design_build_body: AI-native development using Claude, Cursor, and modern tools. Fast iteration, transparent progress, real results.
how_we_build.launch_support_body: We ship, we measure, we refine. Every project includes post-launch support and documentation.

aloha_standard.headline: Built with Aloha.
aloha_standard.body: Giving back is core to how HonuVibe operates. We dedicate capacity to nonprofit and community projects — delivering the same quality and care as any commercial engagement.
aloha_standard.caption_body: Part of every quarter, by design
aloha_standard.cta: Interested in a community or nonprofit collaboration? Get in touch

two_path_cta.headline: Inspired by what you see?
two_path_cta.subhead: Whether you want to learn AI yourself or bring AI training to your organization — there's a path for you.
